ctdclient.view.procstep module

class ctdclient.view.procstep.ProcessingStep(*args, step, psa, psa_paths, **kwargs)

Bases: ViewMixin, CtkFrame

Handles the processing step selection procedure. Automatically selects the closest named psa inside of the psa folder.

Parameters:

  • window (Parent frame)

  • preset_value (sets the name of the processing step, if already known) – (Default value = ‘’)

set_closest_psa_value(*args, **kwargs)

Scans the psa folder for the closest string compared to the step.

new_processing_step()
remove_step()
